There is strong consensus among studies that gutta-percha is the preferred and traditionally used material for endodontic applications because of its unique thermal behavior allowing it to soften and adapt well during placement. While some newer alternatives like bioceramics offer certain benefits, none have replaced gutta-percha completely due to its proven effectiveness and widespread acceptance. Therefore, considering the extensive literature backing the use of gutta-percha specifically for these sizes, I concur with the original assessment.
